Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the command room. Ikutsuki[n]is alone, writing something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hm... A Shadow in the middle of town... It managed to take over public transportation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 1 25 25}I should investigate whether this means it's finally begun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 1 25 25}I bet this subject would make a good "one-liner"...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oh, I need to note that one down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Unfortunately, lady luck played a large part in our victory...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Especially toward the end. If he hadn't guessed at the right controls, things could have been very bad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}For Shadows to work in a group to overrun large machines is unprecedented.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Ahahaha! What is it with me today!? I'm on a roll![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Ah, better write that one down too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 2 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Always be prepared for heavy lifting during a mission...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 2 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Because Shadows aren't light![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Whoa, I'm getting a little off-subject... But who cares!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 0 25 25}Hey... I should write all these down and show them off the next time everyone gets together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 2 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 2 25 25}"Don't care for seafood? They also serve GROUND beef!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hehe... Ahahaha! This has nothing to do with the status report anymore, but I'm having a blast![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The recording ends here...[n]{f 1 1}
